resumo: English can be used to express opinions and interact in media-related contexts.
Learning structures for agreement, disagreement and point of view strengthens communication.
This topic helps students connect language study with contemporary communication practices.

explicacao.texto: Students can learn to use simple structures to share opinions, justify ideas and respond to other viewpoints. These expressions are important in conversations, digital interactions and classroom communication.
explicacao.dica: Observe expressions such as 'I think', 'In my opinion', 'I agree' and 'I disagree'.

explicacao.texto: Media texts, comments, posts and everyday communication often involve opinion and interpretation. Studying this topic helps learners understand how English appears in contemporary social interactions.
explicacao.dica: Pay attention to how short opinion phrases appear in messages, videos and digital texts.

exemplos.enunciado: Read a short comment in English where someone shares an opinion about a social topic.
passos: Identify the expression used to introduce the opinion.
Observe whether the idea is supported by a reason.
Relate the structure to other communication contexts.
exemplos.resposta: This example shows how opinion language is useful in real communication situations.

exercicios.enunciado: The expression 'I think' is used to:
alternativas: introduce an opinion
describe a chemical reaction
name a geometric solid
classify a verb in Portuguese
exercicios.explicacao: 'I think' is a common way to express a point of view in English.

alternativas: I agree
I am a book
Blue is seven
Open the table
exercicios.explicacao: 'I agree' is used to show agreement with someone else's idea.

alternativas: Opinion language helps students communicate in real contexts.
Media texts never include opinions.
English cannot be used in digital communication.
Disagreement expressions are unnecessary in conversation.
exercicios.respostaCorreta: Opinion language helps students communicate in real contexts.
exercicios.explicacao: This type of language is useful in conversations, comments, posts and classroom interaction.

exercicios.enunciado: Studying this topic helps the student:
alternativas: connect English learning to contemporary communication
avoid any real use of the language
memorize isolated words only
ignore interaction in media contexts
exercicios.respostaCorreta: connect English learning to contemporary communication
exercicios.explicacao: The topic links language study to real communication practices.
